calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Jan-10-2014 is admitted to probate. John Fischer is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. DISCLOSURE: The assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing of petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration is set for Nov-09-2027.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
